title: Collection
description: A curated collection of pieces. References pieces by slug array — never embedded objects.

description.description: Substantive description of the collection's theme or curatorial intent.

coverImageUrl.description: Relative URL to the collection's cover image.

pieceSlugs.description: Ordered array of piece slugs. Resolved to Piece objects at read time.

featured.description: Whether this collection is featured on the homepage.

sortOrder.description: Display ordering. Lower values appear first.
